title: Rape-accused's case postponed again
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The two men accused...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The two men accused of the rape of a 25-year-old woman in Asla Park in September made a brief appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Wednesday 3 December.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The two men accused of the rape of a 25-year-old woman in Asla Park in September made a brief appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Wednesday 3 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The men - aged 27 and 31 - were arrested shortly after the incident took place. Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp of the KwaNonqaba Police previously told Mossel Bay Advertiser the woman had received what she thought would be a lift home from a party, allegedly from one of the accused.","html":"The men - aged 27 and 31 - were arrested shortly after the incident took place. Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp of the KwaNonqaba Police previously told Mossel Bay Advertiser the woman had received what she thought would be a lift home from a party, allegedly from one of the accused."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Instead she was taken to his home where he and the second accused allegedly raped her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The case will continue in court on Monday 8 December.","html":"The case will continue in court on Monday 8 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both of the accused will remain in police custody until then. Their bail applications are yet to be finalised.","html":"Both of the accused will remain in police custody until then. Their bail applications are yet to be finalised."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Two arrested in connection with Asla Park rape","Bail applications under way for Asla Park rape-accused"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
